title: Certain Questing Additions
description: Small QoL and animation tweaks for FTB Quests.
body:
This mod adds a few minor improvements and _smooth_ animations to FTB Quests mod.

You can fine-tune everything via the in-game config.
Command: `/certain-questing-additions config`.

**Features:**
- [NEW] APNG images support (name your image as `*.apng.png`)
- [NEW] Shader based background support for each chapter
- EMI Integration
- Hover animations for quests and panel buttons
- Smooth quest panel opening and zoom transitions
- Adjustable glow opacity for buttons and quest highlights
- Optional easing for all UI animations

Developer's Discord Community: [Click me here!](https://discord.0mods.team)

![Hover quest image](https://cdn.0mods.team/cqa/hovering.gif)

![Opening quest description animation](https://cdn.0mods.team/cqa/opening.gif)
